title: Add some atmosphere
description: Changes cows and pigs, adds a variety of vegetation to the world and fireflies
body:
**This is my first mod in Mcreator, so there may be bugs and your feedback is important to me, so don’t hesitate to write about everything in the comments!**

### **REQUIREMENTS**

1.  Minecraft version 1.20.1
2. No additional mods needed!

### **FEATURES**

- Changing the behavior of cows and pigs, adds more variability and realism to them
- Adds fireflies at night in the meadows
- Adds vanilla-style vegetation to biomes such as taiga and savanna
- Adds blueberry bushes, the berries of which can be turned into a potion with a new freezing effect
- Adds new freezing effect
...and more details for the atmosphere!
